case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS WASHINGTON, JAMES W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,307.45 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JAMES W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
